title: Fraudulent use of false instrument for weighing
chapter_title: Offences relating to Weights and Measures
content: Whoever fraudulently uses any instrument for weighing which he knows to be false, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

related_sections.title: Fraudulent use of false weight or measure

sentencing_ladder.penalty: Up to 1 year imprisonment, or fine, or both

illumination_lamp.scenario: A merchant knowingly uses a scale that he has modified to show a weight higher than the actual item, in order to overcharge a customer.
illumination_lamp.legal_effect: The merchant has committed fraudulent use of a false instrument for weighing under Section 264.

footnotes.text: Requires an overt act and intent to deceive. The mere passive possession of an unbalanced or defective scale is handled under Section 266; Section 264 specifically punishes the active, knowing exploitation of that instrument during a transaction to cheat a consumer.

title: Fraudulent use of false weight or measure
chapter_title: Offences relating to Weights and Measures
content: Whoever fraudulently uses any false weight or false measure of length or capacity, or fraudulently uses any weight or any measure of length or capacity as a different weight or measure from what it is, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine, or with both.

sentencing_ladder.penalty: Up to 1 year imprisonment, or fine, or both

illumination_lamp.scenario: A trader uses a 900-gram weight while representing it to the buyer as a standard 1-kilogram weight.
illumination_lamp.legal_effect: This constitutes fraudulent use of a false weight under Section 265.

media_tutor.title: Offences Relating to Weights and Measures - Legal Analysis
